headline: IP Q1 Deep Dive: Margin Headwinds Persist Amid Cost Actions and Volume Gains
summary: Packaging and materials company International Paper (NYSE:IP) reported Q1 CY2026 results topping the market’s revenue expectations, with sales up 1.2% year on year to $5.97 billion. Its non-GAAP profit of $0.15 per share was in line with analysts’ consensus estimates.
